description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly gray mesh upper with dark navy overlays and a white midsole. The shoe has a low-cut profile, providing ankle mobility, and is accented with orange details on the heel tab and tongue. The Reebok logo is prominently displayed on the lateral side near the heel and on the tongue, both in white. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in a dark color, and the shoe's interior appears padded for comfort. The outsole is white and slightly textured, designed for urban walking or running. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, breathable, and flexible shoe suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A gray and navy athletic sneaker with orange accents, white midsole, and Reebok branding, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gray mesh upper, dark navy overlays, orange heel tab, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and Reebok logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Reebok logo on the heel and more of the orange accent.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the orange heel tab, padded collar, and Reebok logo on the heel counter.
attribute_logo: White triangular Reebok logo on the lateral heel and tongue
